texto: It won't do to be afraid of failure. Failure is the mother of success
autor: a long journey begins from the ground beneath his feet.
explicacao: Citação de a long journey begins from the ground beneath his feet. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “It won't do to be afraid of failure. Failure is the mother of success” articula reflexao, gen-urobuchi, failure em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
